captures.alt: Desktop production ReproForge privacy notice showing bounded inputs, provider purposes, 30-day and 365-day retention, account export and deletion, and the no-analytics disclosure.
captures.caption: Real public production privacy page at the stable ReproForge origin.

captures.alt: Mobile production ReproForge security page showing private vulnerability reporting, immutable repository authorization, deny-all sandbox execution, OAuth checks, and private-beta limits without horizontal overflow.
captures.caption: Real public production security page at a 390-pixel mobile viewport.

captures.alt: Mobile Auth0 login reached from ReproForge production after the routing repair, showing email and password fields plus sign-up without a generic error, Google option, or development-key warning.
captures.caption: Live unauthenticated Auth0 Universal Login reached through the repaired ReproForge production entry path.

subsequentProductionGates.scope: production MCP protocol and live provider regression gate
public intermittent fixture and isolated provider outcome
production MCP discovery, idempotent start, and read latency
production readiness, runner capability, Auth0 OAuth compatibility, disposable DCR canary, and direct-login recovery

sanitization: Public static policy content and an unauthenticated hosted login form only; no account, credential, private repository, provider resource, cookie, or user data.
provenance: Policy captures are first-party pages from the exact ReproForge production deployment; the Auth0 capture is the live hosted login reached from that deployment. None are concept art, generated imagery, or ChatGPT-host screenshots.
openGates: Browser login, GitHub App installation, signed-in public/private canaries, and ChatGPT-host evidence are not claimed by this record.
